name: who-is-adam
description: Evidence-grounded ICML PDF review assistant for agent runtimes.

interface.shortDescription: Review ICML-style PDFs with evidence-grounded checks.
interface.longDescription: Installs the who-is-adam agent skill for local ICML-style PDF review workflows. The skill calls the who-is-adam CLI for deterministic offline checks and Markdown review artifact generation.
defaultPrompt: Use who-is-adam to review this local ICML PDF.
Run an offline who-is-adam smoke test.
Check this paper for ICML review readiness.
